name: sifat-skills
description: Personal marketplace of Claude Code skills by Sifat Ullah Chowdhury.

plugins.name: compact-comments
plugins.description: Compress code comments into single-line, lossless, agent-optimized notes — collapse verbose or multi-line comments (and, when asked, docstrings/JSDoc) to the tersest form that still preserves every fact an AI agent needs, while keeping the surrounding code clean for humans.
